🚁 How DJI Dock 3 Is Transforming Urban Governance in China

In Changsha, DJI Dock 3 paired with Matrice 4D is enabling 24/7 automated aerial patrols, helping authorities detect illegal construction, monitor urban violations, and respond to emergencies faster.

The results:
• ⚡ 300% higher inspection efficiency
• 📉 25% lower labor costs
• 🚨 Earlier hazard detection

A clear example of how drone automation is shifting city management from manual patrols to intelligent, data-driven operations.

👉 Read the full article to learn more.

Earlier this week we announced the installation of DJI Dock 3 onto our Team UAV Wildtrak truck.

Here are the highlights from the first operational flight, which took place at Manchester Barton Aerodrome and was remotely piloted from Glasgow! 

The system is fully integrated onto the vehicle, allowing us to position, deploy and manage autonomous flights directly within live environments. Missions can be scheduled, triggered as required and operated remotely, with full oversight.

This is practical deployment, not concept.

It gives us greater flexibility across infrastructure, utilities and complex operational sites, while maintaining consistent and repeatable data capture.

The Team UAV truck with Dock 3 is now operational. If you would like more information or a live demonstration to see how this could support your operations, get in touch.

Site monitoring shouldn’t stop when the workday ends.

With DJI Dock 3 and Matrice 4D, teams can:
🏗️ Run automated monitoring missions around the clock
🏗️ Track activity across large sites in real time
🏗️ Capture long-range details for verification
🏗️ Improve operational safety with remote oversight
🏗️ Turn aerial data into faster decision-making

From construction sites to infrastructure projects, dock-based drone deployment helps teams stay informed, day and night.

How would 24/7 aerial visibility improve your operations?

🎬 AeronexFZCO

We are selling our DJI Dock 1 system with a Matrice 30T drone and RC Plus controller.

These were only used for demonstration purposes so low flight hours.

Fully autonomous dock setup, ideal for construction progress, inspections, and site monitoring. Thermal + zoom capabilities included.

Ready to deploy.

Message me for details and pricing.

DJI Dock 3 allows drone missions to run as a complete automated cycle, from take off through to landing and reset.

Once a flight is complete, the Matrice 4TD returns to the dock, aligns with the landing platform and lands precisely before the dock closes and the aircraft begins charging ready for the next deployment. The entire process runs automatically, ensuring the system is ready whenever the next mission is required.

For organisations introducing autonomous drone capability, reliability at this stage is essential. The ability for the aircraft to return, land and prepare itself for the next flight ensures the system can continue operating without manual intervention.

For infrastructure, utilities and industrial environments, this is what allows drone operations to move beyond one off deployments and become part of routine operational oversight.

We are continuing to run DJI Dock 3 demonstrations. If you would like to see how autonomous deployment could support your operation, get in touch with our team.

Partnerships like these are what accelerate real adoption. Together, we’re helping an enterprise deploy DJI Dock across the US faster, scale drone infrastructure, and unlock ROI!

Great to see this milestone shared by Fidelity Services Group 

Was great being involved in the deployment and technical setup of the DJI Dock 3 system at Steyn City, assisting with the installation, configuration, connectivity, and operational commissioning of the dock and aircraft.

A key part of the deployment was integrating the docked drone capability into existing security infrastructure — linking it with alarm triggers and the dispatch workflow so the drone can support real-time incident response.

Proud to have played a role in bringing this capability online and excited to see how dock-based drone operations continue to evolve in the security space.

After a DJI Dock 3 mission, teams can generate 3D models directly in FlightHub 2, streamlining the transition from data capture to actionable insight.

The result? Faster analysis and improved operational efficiency.

We are excited to reveal our Team UAV truck, equipped with DJI Dock 3, enabling us to deploy fully autonomous aerial capability wherever it is needed.

This positions Team UAV as one of the first operators in the UK to deploy Dock 3 as a mobile platform.

Dock 3 houses, charges and deploys the aircraft automatically. Integrated onto the truck, it can be transported directly into live environments and activated without traditional mobilisation. Flights can be scheduled, triggered on demand and operated remotely. 

For our clients, this means faster deployment, consistent data capture and reduced operational disruption across live environments. 

Fixed autonomy is powerful. Mobile autonomy takes it further.

The Team UAV truck with Dock 3 is now operational. If you would like more information or a live demonstration to see how this could support your operations, please get in touch with our team.

South Africa is entering a new era of security operations.

Fidelity Services Group is now actively operating the DJI Dock 3 at Steyn City — one of the country’s most prestigious estates.

This isn’t a demonstration. This is real operational capability: automated drone deployment, structured governance, and a premium security model designed for high-value environments.

Technology, innovation, and proactive protection working together to enhance safety where it matters most.
